name: Gnocchi with Creamy Cabbage Sauce
method: homemade gnocchi (see previous recipe), or you can buy storebought gnocchi if you don’t have time to make it.

Boil salted water for gnocchi. In the meantime, in a frying pan on medium heat, fry the pancetta until crispy. To the same frying pan, add onion, butter, and oil, and saute until the onions are transparent. Add cooked shredded cabbage and saute for a few minutes. Add cream, salt and pepper. Remember, if you like more salt, taste it, and put more. If the sauce isn't thick enough you can add a little flour or cornstarch to the creamy mixture. I mix 1 T of flour or cornstarch in 2 T of cold water and I put a few drops in sauce as I'm mixing it if the consistency isn't creamy enough.
Cook gnocchi for 5 minutes and add directly to your frying pan with cream. Mix and manticare, and sprinkle parmesan cheese over the top. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. Serves 2-3. Olé
